chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Jail Appeal No.S-109 of 2022 (Ali Nawaz Kori Vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of MA No. 5460/2022. 13-03-2023. Mr. Shafique Ahmed Leghari, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant A.G, Pakistan. Mr. Munir Ahmed Siyal Special Prosecutor FIA..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The appellant by way of listed application u/s 426 Cr.P.C has sought for suspension of the sentence awarded to him by learned trial Court by way of impugned judgment, for the reason that it is short one and hearing of his appeal is likely to take time, which is opposed by learned AAG and Special Prosecutor FIR by stating that the hearing of the appeal of the appellant would take no time. Heard arguments and perused the record. Admittedly the aggregate sentence awarded to the appellant being 05 years is short one; he was enjoying the concession of bail at trial and hearing of his appeal is likely to take time, therefore while relying upon the case of Abdul Hameed Vs. Muhammad Abdullah and others (1999 SCMR-2589), the operation of sentence awarded to the appellant by way of impugned judgment is suspended consequently, he is directed to be released on bail, subject to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.100,000/- (rupees One lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Instant listed application is disposed of accordingly. Adjourned to be fixed before the Court, for hearing of main appeal; after preparation of paper book. JUDGE Nasim/P.A
